violations.text: The following hand-washing sinks were blocked: 1.Hand sink in the kitchen was blocked by trash can. 2. Hand sink in front area was blocked by a cart. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. PIC relocated trash can and cart at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Trays were observed on top of the hand-washing sink in kitchen area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC relocated trays. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. PIC relocated can opener to dishwasher to be washed, rinsed and sanitized. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2025
A hand wash sink in the back prep area was observed in poor repair and/or improper adjustment (leak observed and was lacking splash guard). New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The handle of the deli slicer was in poor repair (handle cracked). PIC instructed to not used slicer until service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 10/31/2024
The food prep sink and a walk-in cooler were lacking adequate air gaps. New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
The wall behind a chest freezer was observed in poor repair (large whole observed). New Violation. Correct By: 11/07/2024
